'''鈭歵-dh-ng-s''' ('''katadhngesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vodcast|vodcast]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-dh-ng-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vodcast|vodcast]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-dh-ng-s
|-
! Lemma
| katadhngesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitadhngesoko|thitadhngesoko]] || [[word:jitadhngesoko|jitadhngesoko]] || [[word:shitadhngesoko|shitadhngesoko]] || [[word:kitadhngesoko|kitadhngesoko]]
|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
